title: エンジョイミュージカル！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm walking around the academy on my
lunch break...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
So sleepy... Training ran late again yesterday, so I
shouldn't be surprised.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: UWAAAAGH! Cheer up, Taishiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: The hell?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey, hey! Taishin! Have you heard about the musical Animal Kingdom?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's a musical! You know, those singing plays!
Anyway, wanna star in one with us?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh, no... Why are you even asking?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Musicals are excellent for training the body. We
could start right now if you wish.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You're in on this too, Hayahide? Is this a joke?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: A fun way to exercise, eh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well, you're always training by yourself at night,
right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that kinda lonely and boring? I bet it'd be
super fun to do a musical together!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Musicals require a variety of skills in the
performing arts, such as singing, dancing, and
acting.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's a fantastic full-body workout and also serves
as practice for concerts—a wonderful form of
exercise, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...Nah. Sorry, I'm out. That's not really my thing,
so you two go ahead and do whatever.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, very well. Then shall we give you a little
teaser first?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Don't take your eyes off us! Let's do this,
Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: HIT THE MUSIC!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wait... You're doing this now?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket and Biwa Hayahide start
dancing... and dancing...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pfft! What the heck is this?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hayahide and her stern face in a musical?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Heh... Haha! You've got to be kidding me! Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ahhhhh! Taishin's LAUGHING!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Good! We pulled it off, Ticket! Mission complete!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: M-mission? What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! Oh, Taishin! We know you've been really
exhausted lately!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So me and Hayahide were thinking of ways to
cheer you up!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So how was that? Pretty entertaining, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hang on a second. So you're saying that...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: The whole musical bit was all just a ploy?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
More or less. But I'm relieved to see you smiling
as a result.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Mm-hmm! You had the hugest grin! Seeing you smile like that makes me so happy!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh! You tricked me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Just so you know, I filmed all of that—including
Hayahide's emotionless jig!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Might be good to get your sister in on the fun... I
wonder how she'd react?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: E-excuse me?! Wait! Brian cannot see that!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, yay! You two are having so much fun
now! ♪
